mapper.sql:
/* wms-outbound-obOrdSepStraMapper-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepStraMasterSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 주문분리 전략 : 마스터 조회 SQL */ SELECT 0 AS CHK , MST.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , CT.CTNM /*센터명*/ , MST.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OW.OWNM /*화주명*/ , MST.ORDSEPSTGCD /*전략코드*/ , MST.ORDSEPSTGNM /*전략명*/ , COALESCE(MST.USEYN, 'N') AS USEYN /*사용여부*/ , MST.INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , MST.INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , MST.UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , MST.UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_ORD_SEP_STG_MSTR MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON MST.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW OW ON MST.OWKEY = OW.OWKEY WHERE 1=1
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSepStraMapper-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepStraHeaderSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 주문분리 전략 : 헤더 조회 SQL */ SELECT 0 AS CHK , INFO.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , INFO.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , INFO.ORDSEPSTGCD /*주문 분리 전략코드*/ , INFO.ORDSEPPRI /*주문 분리 우선 순위*/ , INFO.ORDSEPCRITCD /*주문 분리 기준코드*/ , INFO.QTY /*PCS*/ , INFO.QTYRNGCD /*PCS구간*/ , INFO.VOL /*CBM*/ , INFO.VOLRNGCD /*CBM구간*/ , INFO.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , INFO.WEIGHTRNGCD /*중량구간*/ , INFO.INSERTURKEY /*입력아이디*/ , INFO.INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INFO.UPDATEURKEY /*수정아이디*/ , INFO.UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_ORD_SEP_STG_MSTR MST INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_ORD_SEP_STG INFO ON MST.CTKEY = INFO.CTKEY AND MST.OWKEY = INFO.OWKEY AND MST.ORDSEPSTGCD = INFO.ORDSEPSTGCD WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND MST.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND MST.ORDSEPSTGCD = #{ordsepstgcd}
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obOrdSepStraMapper-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepStraHeaderChk - WMS > 출고 관리 > 주문분리 전략 : 주문 분리 전략 헤더 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ORDSEPSTGCD , ORDSEPCRITCD , ORDSEPPRI , QTY , QTYRNGCD , VOL , VOLRNGCD , WEIGHT , WEIGHTRNGCD , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_ORD_SEP_STG WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ORDSEPSTGCD = #{ordsepstgcd} AND ORDSEPCRITCD = #{ordsepcritcd} AND ORDSEPPRI = #{ordseppri}
